properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my help when I’m weak You are my strength when I fall You hold my hand when I fear You are the one I call

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You speak with peace in the storm You guide my steps in the dark You stand beside me each day You calm my anxious heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In Your hands, I’m secure You take my hand, I’m not alone You lift me up, You make me strong In Your hands, I’m secure

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When troubles rise, You are near You never leave me behind Your love surrounds me with peace In You, my hope I find

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No fear can hold me down No storm will shake my ground Your hand will guide me through I’ll trust in all You do

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In Your hands, I’m secure You take my hand, I trust You
